title: Daggermouth and Boom Boom
description: Relive the classic antics of best friends and sometimes enemies, Daggermouth and Boom Boom.
quote: I did twenty laps and I’m about to do twenty more!
altHero: Daggermouth, a fish wearing a crown, reads the paper and smiles at Boom Boom, a purple cat in a striped shirt
alt1: Daggermouth sits alone at a table reading the paper
alt2: Daggermouth throws his newspaper as Boom Boom laps up milk from a bowl on the table
alt3: Daggermouth chases Boom Boom out the door
alt4: Daggermouth chases Boom Boom down the road
